另外 Fable 5 有个优点也是缺点，就是特别喜欢验证，各种验证，结果固然是好，但是时间耗得很长不一定合算。

Fable's attempt to complete Kublai Khan. Better, though no Coleridge: https://t.co/1s7OdRtjzP

The most interesting thing is that it thought for 10 minutes & the thinking trace is full of pretty complicated (seeming?) musings about Coleridge's intent. A little literal, though. https://t.co/6m8JzqqCa1

The full text:

Kubla Khan

Or, a Vision in a Dream

In Xanadu did Kubla Khan
A stately pleasure-dome decree:
Where Alph, the sacred river, ran
Through caverns measureless to man
Down to a sunless sea.
So twice five miles of fertile ground
With walls and towers were girdled
